metadata.description: Live German weather-warning and forecast skills powered by the dwd-cli (DWD Warnwetter app API)

plugins.name: dwd
plugins.description: Brief the current German weather warnings, decode a DWD station forecast into real units, export warning areas as GeoJSON, and cross-check official warnings against crowd reports — all over the open, key-free DWD Warnwetter app API via the dwd-cli.
